Name: Akeyless - JWT Login
Description:
This step authenticates to [Akeyless](https://www.akeyless.io) using a JSON Web Token (JWT) or OIDC token.

The API token from the response is stored as a sensitive [output variable](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables/output-variables#sensitive-output-variables) named AkeylessAuthToken for use in other step templates.

---

**Required:**
- Akeyless Access ID configured for JWT or OIDC authentication
- JWT or OIDC bearer token

**Optional:**
- Access type (jwt or oidc, default jwt)
- Gateway/API URL (default: https://api.akeyless.io)

**Notes:**
- Bind the JWT from an Octopus OIDC account, a prior script step, or a sensitive project variable.

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Auth.Jwt.GatewayUrl
Parameters.HelpText: The Akeyless API or Gateway URL. For SaaS, use https://api.akeyless.io.
Parameters.Label: Gateway URL

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Auth.Jwt.AccessId
Parameters.HelpText: The Akeyless Access ID for the JWT/OIDC auth method.
Parameters.Label: Access ID

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Auth.Jwt.AccessType
Parameters.HelpText: Set to `oidc` when your Akeyless auth method requires OIDC instead of JWT.
Parameters.Label: Access type
